Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where both occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants versus variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION when followed by Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to when followed by Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION since Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that eventually reach Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER in cross-approval variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in variants that bypass PRE_APPROVER versus those that include PRE_APPROVER steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to be done in cases with multiple rejections versus cases with no rejections
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs
